message:
fix: page-level error boundary and resilient context hooks

- Add PageErrorBoundary between ChunkErrorBoundary and AppErrorBoundary
  so render crashes show recovery UI while keeping sidebar/navbar intact
- useRewards/useTour return safe fallbacks instead of throwing when called
  outside their providers (happens during error-boundary recovery)
- Null-safe item.tags access in Marketplace/useMarketplace

Fixes #3494, Fixes #3495

Co-authored-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

() => triggerResizeOnActivation(path) : undefined} > - }> - {element} - + + }> + {element} + + ))}

@@ -277,7 +277,7 @@ export function useMarketplace() {
     const matchesSearch = !searchQuery ||
       item.name.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase()) ||
       item.description.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase())
-    const matchesTag = !selectedTag || item.tags.includes(selectedTag)
+    const matchesTag = !selectedTag || (item.tags || []).includes(selectedTag)
     const matchesType = !selectedType || item.type === selectedType
     const matchesStatus = !showHelpWanted || item.status === 'help-wanted'
     return matchesSearch && matchesTag && matchesType && matchesStatus
